class.name: SpineBoneData
class.brief_description: Stores the setup pose for a bone.
class.description: Stores the setup pose for a bone. The setup pose is the reference pose for the skeleton, before any animations are applied.

method.name: get_index
method.description: Returns the index of the bone in Skeleton.bones.

method.name: get_bone_name
method.description: Returns the name of the bone, which is unique across all bones in the skeleton.

method.name: get_parent
method.description: Returns the parent bone data. May be null for the root bone.

method.name: get_setup_pose
method.description: Returns the local setup pose for this bone, containing position, rotation, scale, and shear.

method.name: is_skin_required
method.description: Returns whether the bone is only active when a skin containing it is active.

method.name: set_skin_required
method.description: Sets whether the bone is only active when a skin containing it is active.

method.name: get_color
method.description: Returns the color of the bone as it was in Spine, or a default color if nonessential data was not exported. Bones are not usually rendered at runtime.

method.name: set_color
method.description: Sets the color of the bone.

method.name: get_icon
method.description: Returns the icon name for this bone, if any.

method.name: is_visible
method.description: Returns whether the bone is visible.

method.name: set_visible
method.description: Sets whether the bone is visible.
